summary_from_search: 33 analysts covering JPM: 14 Buy, 12 Hold, 0 Sell. Median price target $345.00. Average 1-year price target $339.46 (low $257.89, high $420). Consensus Buy with avg PT ~$330-$345 range, implying ~7-12% upside from current levels.
